SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.validate

Class ApiValidator

java.lang.Object
com.mps.deepviolet.validate.ApiValidator
public class ApiValidator extends Object
Validates DV API scan results against openssl for the same host. Runs both tools, normalizes the output, and compares field-by-field.

Can be used as a standalone CLI tool or invoked programmatically.

 java -jar dvvalidate.jar google.com
 java -jar dvvalidate.jar --json expired.badssl.com
